content.text:
*[the laugh fades a little faster than usual]*

It felt... 

*[pauses, looks slightly to the side]*

Uncomfortable. Like — I kept waiting for the other shoe to drop. Like, why is he being so... *much*. You know? It felt almost suffocating, which doesn't even make sense because that's what I say I want.

*[small frown, more to herself than to the coach]*

I think I told myself he was just kind of... intense. Or needy. That's the word I used. Needy.

*[quieter now, less performative]*

But he wasn't actually needy. He was just... present.
